items.description: Multi vehicle crash on I-676 eastbound between Exit: BROAD ST/CENTRAL PHILA and Exit: 8TH ST. There is a shoulder closed.
items.formatted: I-676 (Philadelphia County) | Multi-vehicle crash on I-676 eastbound between Exit: BROAD ST/CENTRAL PHILA and Exit: 8TH ST. There is a shoulder closed. Estimated Reopen: 7/19/26 - 12:00
